words.exampleArabic: يَعْمَلُ أَبِي مُهَنْدِسًا فِي شَرِكَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Moj otac radi kao inženjer u velikoj kompaniji.
words.exampleEn: My father works as an engineer in a large company.

words.exampleBs: Moja majka jako voli kuhati.
words.exampleEn: My mother loves cooking a lot.

words.exampleBs: Njegov sin studira na univerzitetu.
words.exampleEn: His son is studying at the university.

words.exampleBs: Njena kći voli crtanje i muziku.
words.exampleEn: Her daughter loves drawing and music.

words.exampleArabic: يَلْعَبُ أَخِي كُرَةَ الْقَدَمِ كُلَّ يَوْمِ جُمْعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Moj brat igra fudbal svaki petak.
words.exampleEn: My brother plays football every Friday.

words.exampleBs: Moja sestra živi u drugom gradu.
words.exampleEn: My sister lives in another city.

words.exampleBs: Dedo priča priče iz prošlosti.
words.exampleEn: The grandfather tells stories from the past.

words.exampleBs: Nena uvijek donosi slatkiše djeci.
words.exampleEn: The grandmother always brings sweets for the children.

words.exampleBs: Amidža i njegova porodica su nas posjetili za Bajram.
words.exampleEn: My uncle and his family visited us during Eid.

words.exampleBs: Moja strina stanuje blizu naše kuće.
words.exampleEn: My aunt lives close to our house.

words.exampleBs: Moj amidžić je moj blizak prijatelj.
words.exampleEn: My cousin is my close friend.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَاعِدُ الزَّوْجُ زَوْجَتَهُ فِي تَرْبِيَةِ الأَوْلَادِ.
words.exampleBs: Suprug pomaže suprugi u odgajanju djece.
words.exampleEn: The husband helps his wife in raising the children.

words.exampleBs: Njegova supruga radi kao ljekarica u bolnici.
words.exampleEn: His wife works as a doctor at the hospital.

words.exampleBs: Beba spava dugo vremena.
words.exampleEn: The baby sleeps for long hours.

words.exampleBs: Moja spavaća soba je prostrana i svjetla.
words.exampleEn: My bedroom is spacious and bright.

words.exampleArabic: تُحِبُّ أُمِّي قَضَاءَ الْوَقْتِ فِي الْمَطْبَخِ.
words.exampleBs: Moja majka voli provoditi vrijeme u kuhinji.
words.exampleEn: My mother loves spending time in the kitchen.

words.exampleBs: Kupatilo je na kraju hodnika.
words.exampleEn: The bathroom is at the end of the hallway.

words.exampleArabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ فِي غُرْفَةِ الْجُلُوسِ مَسَاءً.
words.exampleBs: Porodica se okuplja u dnevnoj sobi navečer.
words.exampleEn: The family gathers in the living room in the evening.

words.exampleBs: Moj otac uzgaja ruže u bašti.
words.exampleEn: My father grows roses in the garden.

words.exampleBs: Sjedimo na balkonu i pijemo čaj.
words.exampleEn: We sit on the balcony and drink tea.

words.exampleBs: Kupili smo novi namještaj za dnevnu sobu.
words.exampleEn: We bought new furniture for the living room.

words.exampleBs: Dijete rano spava u svom krevetu.
words.exampleEn: The child goes to sleep early in his bed.

words.exampleArabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ حَوْلَ الطَّاوِلَةِ لِتَنَاوُلِ الطَّعَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica se okuplja oko stola za jelo.
words.exampleEn: The family gathers around the table to eat.

words.exampleBs: Sjedni na stolicu, molim te.
words.exampleEn: Please sit on the chair.

words.exampleBs: Otvori prozor da uđe svjež zrak.
words.exampleEn: Open the window to let in fresh air.

words.exampleArabic: أَغْلِقِ الْبَابَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ عِنْدَ الْخُرُوجِ.
words.exampleBs: Molim te zatvori vrata pri izlasku.
words.exampleEn: Please close the door when leaving.

words.exampleBs: Majka je upalila lampu u sumrak.
words.exampleEn: The mother lit the lamp at dusk.

words.exampleArabic: السَّجَّادَةُ فِي غُرْفَةِ الْجُلُوسِ جَمِيلَةٌ جِدًّا.
words.exampleBs: Tepih u dnevnoj sobi je veoma lijep.
words.exampleEn: The carpet in the living room is very beautiful.

words.exampleBs: Moj brat se oženio prošle godine.
words.exampleEn: My brother got married last year.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَكَلَّمُونَ أَحْيَانًا عَنِ الزَّوْجَيْنِ اللَّذَيْنِ طَلَّقَا.
words.exampleBs: Ponekad govore o bračnom paru koji se razveo.
words.exampleEn: They sometimes speak of the couple who divorced.

words.exampleArabic: رَبَّتِ الأُمُّ أَوْلَادَهَا عَلَى الْقِيَمِ الْحَسَنَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Majka je odgajala svoju djecu u dobrim vrijednostima.
words.exampleEn: The mother raised her children with good values.

words.en: to care for, to look after
words.exampleBs: Kći se brine o svojoj bolesnoj neni.
words.exampleEn: The daughter cares for her sick grandmother.

words.exampleBs: Posjećujemo djedove svake sedmice.
words.exampleEn: We visit our grandparents every week.

words.exampleBs: Otac i majka žive zajedno sa svojom djecom.
words.exampleEn: The father and mother live together with their children.

words.exampleBs: Majka je skuhala ukusan ručak.
words.exampleEn: The mother cooked a delicious meal for lunch.

words.exampleBs: Djeca čiste svoje sobe petkom.
words.exampleEn: The children clean their rooms on Fridays.

words.exampleBs: Moj brat je oženjen i ima dvoje djece.
words.exampleEn: My brother is married and has two children.

words.exampleBs: Moj prijatelj je još uvijek neoženjen.
words.exampleEn: My friend is still single.

words.exampleBs: Moja sestra je trudna i čeka svoje prvo dijete.
words.exampleEn: My sister is pregnant and expecting her first child.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ الأَشْخَاصُ الْمُسِنُّونَ إِلَى رِعَايَةٍ خَاصَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Stariji ljudi trebaju posebnu brigu.
words.exampleEn: Elderly people need special care.

words.exampleArabic: لَا يَزَالُ صَغِيرًا وَيَحْتَاجُ إِلَى رِعَايَةِ وَالِدَيْهِ.
words.exampleBs: On je još uvijek mlad i treba roditeljsku brigu.
words.exampleEn: He is still young and needs his parents' care.

words.exampleBs: Moja majka je žena dobrog srca.
words.exampleEn: My mother is a kind-hearted woman.

words.exampleBs: Naš otac je bio strog, ali pravedan.
words.exampleEn: Our father was strict but fair.

words.exampleBs: Naša porodica se okuplja za praznike.
words.exampleEn: Our family gathers for holidays.

words.exampleArabic: عَدْنَا إِلَى الْمَنْزِلِ بَعْدَ رِحْلَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Vratili smo se kući nakon dugog putovanja.
words.exampleEn: We returned home after a long journey.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْكُنُ عَائِلَتُنَا فِي شَقَّةٍ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Naša porodica stanuje u stanu u centru grada.
words.exampleEn: Our family lives in an apartment in the city centre.
